# Floating Rate Note Pricing

> Floating rate note pricing using discount margin methodology and swap zero curve.

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** bonds · floating-rate · frn · pricing · money-market · jibar

## What this does

Floating rate note pricing using discount margin methodology and swap zero curve.

Specifies 1 acceptance outcome that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **notional** *(number, required)* — Notional Amount
- **settlement_date** *(date, required)* — Settlement Date
- **maturity_date** *(date, required)* — Maturity Date
- **market_spread** *(number, required)* — Market Spread

## What must be true

- **pricing → forward_rate:** Fwd_rate = (DF(t)/DF(t+1) - 1) × 365/days
- **pricing → coupon_payment:** Coupon = Nominal × (Forward_Rate + Issue_Spread) × days/365
- **pricing → frn_price:** Price = Sum[DF_zero × (Coupon_i + Principal)]

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Frn Priced** — when market_spread exists; maturity_date exists, then FRN all-in price calculated. _Why: Calculate FRN all-in price using discount margin method._

## Errors it can return

- `INVALID_SPREAD` — Spread values must be non-negative

## Connects to

- **bond-pricing-models** *(required)*
